programme.title: E7 - Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: The chefs are challenged to a taco throwdown for the taco king, actor and restaurateur Danny Trejo. For the Quickfire, the only sharp tool they can use is a machete, in honor of one of Danny’s signature characters.

programme.title: E26 - The Sleep Eater
programme.desc: When Chowder knocks his internal clock out of whack, he becomes an unstoppable sleep eater!

programme.title: E28 - Shnitzel & The Lead Farfel
programme.desc: Shnitzel trains to revive his muscles and lift the heaviest object around.

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: An outrageously insane new game show of puzzles and brainteasers for kids to play on television.

programme.title: E7 - Freaky Gwen Ben
programme.desc: Ben interferes with malicious magician Hex's quest for the Titan Gloves at a flea market and accidentally switches bodies with Gwen, forcing him to walk a mile in her shoes and vice-versa!

programme.title: E19 - Waterfilter
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max's trip to Niagara Falls is cut short by the horrid Hydromanders - creatures menacing them and their fellow tourists.

programme.title: E21 - Bright Lights, Black Hearts
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max stop by the graveyard set of Gwen's favourite TV show, The Unalivers. Before long, Ben discovers its lead, Michael Morningstar, is an energy vampire.

programme.title: E24 - Recipe For Disaster
programme.desc: During Chefapalooza in the Rocky Mountains, three famous chefs and infamous bad-guys, The Tri-Chefta, hunt down Wildvine in hopes of creating their most exotic dish to date.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: Superman returns after five years in space to find Lois engaged and Lex Luthor with a sinister plan that will endanger America.

programme.title: E4 - I Wish She Would Trust Me
programme.desc: A wish about trust causes a serious trust issue between Daniel and Ruby, too. Meanwhile, Daniel learns secrets about his dad that he never knew.

programme.title: E5 - Bring Your Loved One To Work
programme.desc: In the Quickfire, it’s a true test of communication as the chefs play a game of telephone with their loved ones as they try to reproduce the dish their family member is currently eating at a nearby restaurant. Then, the chefs are tasked with creating a signature product that they will bottle, use on a dish and sell at a food festival. They may get help from their visiting loved ones, but for one chef, the help won’t save them from being sent home. Celebrity Chef Nancy Silverton is the guest judge joining Tom, Padma and Gail.

programme.title: Piece By Piece
programme.desc: Follow this autobiography where Pharrell Williams shows his imaginative and creative process using Lego, as he constructs Lego models representing his artistic development. Each build reflects a different creative milestone.

programme.title: E12 - The Wrong Customer
programme.desc: An unexpected outlaw unwittingly turns the catering company into his hideout.

programme.title: E15 - Gazpacho Stands Up
programme.desc: Chowder gives Gazpacho a hand in preparing for his big comedy debut. But Chowder's poor penmanship threatens to turn the situation from funny to failure.

programme.title: E16 - A Taste Of Marzipan
programme.desc: When Mung and Ms. Endive unveil the same dish at Marzipan City's biggest food fair, it's an all out war to decide whose is better.

programme.title: E21 - The Heavy Sleeper
programme.desc: When Chowder accidentally puts Mung into a deep sleep, he and Shnitzel must try and wake him before Truffles finds out.

programme.title: E26 - The Sleep Eater
programme.desc: When Chowder knocks his internal clock out of whack, he becomes an unstoppable sleep eater!

programme.title: E28 - Shnitzel & The Lead Farfel
programme.desc: Shnitzel trains to revive his muscles and lift the heaviest object around.

programme.title: E258 - Medieval Upheaval/Bounty Ball/Fear The Fogg/Super-Villain Team-Up/It's Story Time
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen don't want to go to the CD Library. CDs are for old people. Ew. Once Team Tennyson is there, Lord Decibel traps them inside and demands a ransom.

programme.title: E6 - A. Hey Pizza!/Gorilla/Girl's Night Out/You're Fired/Super Robin
programme.desc: Beast Boy and Cyborg try their best to slow the pizza delivery boy so they can get free pizza.

programme.title: E19 - High Score/Rage Against The Tv

programme.title: E118 - The Catfish/The Cycle/The Stars/The Box/The Grades
programme.desc: When Gumball and Darwin realise Grandpa Louie has no friends on Elmore Plus, they feel bad. So they create one - called Muriel. However when Granny Jojo finds out Louie has been spending time online with another 'woman', Muriel not existing isn't going to stop her being destroyed.

programme.title: E1 - B. Cajun Granny Stew/Invisible Muriel/Feast of the Bullfrogs/Tulip's Worm/Clutching F
programme.desc: A crafty fox cooks up a delicious 'Cajun Granny Stew' to enter in a cooking contest, but he's missing one key ingredient: the Granny. Enter Muriel, Courage must save her from ending up in the stew.

programme.title: E260 - Xingo's World/Can I Keep It?/Chicken Nuggets Of Wisdom/All Koiled Up/The Greatest Lak
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max are on the road again and are supposed to be taking in the beautiful sights, but Ben refuses to put his video games away.

programme.title: E105 - The Thing/The Butts
programme.desc: Richard must retrace the memories of his day in order to figure out what “the thing” is, so Nicole’s family dinner with Granny Jo Jo won’t be another epic failure.

programme.title: E21 - Party Pete/Benson Be Gone
programme.desc: When Benson takes the night off, Mordecai and Rigby decide to throw a party. But when it gets off on a rocky start, they seek the help of Party Pete to get their party going.

programme.title: E198 - Blundercup/Small World: Abra-Disaster - Part 1/Small World: Stone Cold Spider - Part
programme.desc: Buttercup is knocked off-kilter by a mysterious force.

programme.title: E118 - The Catfish/The Cycle/The Stars/The Box/The Grades
programme.desc: When Gumball and Darwin realise Grandpa Louie has no friends on Elmore Plus, they feel bad. So they create one - called Muriel. However when Granny Jojo finds out Louie has been spending time online with another 'woman', Muriel not existing isn't going to stop her being destroyed.

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! The adventure begins when Princess Cat is flying her plane but gets in a sticky jammy mess, causing her to lose control! It's up to Kii & Yii to get her down safely. Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: E3 - What Will Cody Do Today?
programme.desc: What will Cody do today? Every day is a new adventure! He might move to a new house with his family & cat, Pickles. Or maybe he'll find a simple empty cardboard box & use his imagination to turn it into a turtle shell, a drum & a race car! He could go on a hike with JJ & race walnut sailboats, or stay home & sing the ABCs over a big pot of alphabet soup. With Cody, you never know what fun you'll have!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E5 - Let's Make, Play & Learn with JJ!
programme.desc: Get ready to make, play & learn with JJ! First, find out what JJ's favorite pizza toppings are as you sing along to this yummy adventure. Then, Dad shows JJ how to make a healthy & delicious snack: fresh fruit ice cream! The hands-on fun continues as TomTom shows JJ how to be a 'toy mechanic' & fix his favorite toy school bus when a wheel pops off. From learning about veggies to becoming 'Clean Machines,' it's a day of creative fun!

programme.title: E4 - A Guide To Fun & Healthy Days!
programme.desc: Blippi is your guide to having fun & healthy days! First, have some fun in the sun while learning from Señor Super Sunscreen how to apply sunscreen properly. Then, shrink down with Blippi & Meekah as they travel to Italy to learn how to make an authentic pizza! The adventure continues as Blippi helps a bear get ready for winter hibernation. After a long day of fun, it's time for bed, as a magical book reads a bedtime story about the benefits of a good night's rest!

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E2 - Construction Chaos & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: Get ready for some construction chaos & clever fixes! First, Mr. Rubble is very tired & puts the plans on the board upside down, causing the crew to build a house upside down! Then, while building a roundabout, the crew finds some big old dinosaur bones! The chaos continues as a power cut stops all their machines, so they hook everything up to clean solar panels instead. From building a pond for frogs to building themselves into a box, it's always chaotic!

programme.title: E1 - Shapes, Songs & Story Time!
programme.desc: Join Ms. Appleberry & JJ for a learning adventure! Explore the letters B, C, R & U through fun activities. Play pretend as you make 'beep-beep' sounds on a bus & act like a playful pup. Sing along to classic songs, discover surprises inside the Melon Learning Box with a special guest & enjoy a rainy day adventure.

programme.title: E2 - A Day of Cody's Favorite Things!
programme.desc: Join Cody for a day filled with all his favorite things! First, Cody gets to live out his dino dreams as he dons a dinosaur costume & pretends to be a monster attacking a toy bridge. The fun continues at school, where he starts playing a guitar & his classmates join in to form their very own rock band! Cody also shows his caring side as he & his friends encounter a lost baby duckling & lead the way to help it find the perfect home.

programme.title: E3 - What Will Cody Do Today?
programme.desc: What will Cody do today? Every day is a new adventure! He might move to a new house with his family & cat, Pickles. Or maybe he'll find a simple empty cardboard box & use his imagination to turn it into a turtle shell, a drum & a race car! He could go on a hike with JJ & race walnut sailboats, or stay home & sing the ABCs over a big pot of alphabet soup. With Cody, you never know what fun you'll have!

programme.title: E21 - Mommy’s Magic Touch
programme.desc: It's song and dance time! Join JJ, his friends and family celebrating life's big moments for little kids. Come along and be part of their fun everyday adventures.

programme.title: E10 - Mommy’s Proud Day
programme.desc: Its Little Angel! Where baby John, his brother, Jack, and sister, Jill inspire kids and families to have fun and to grow and learn through play. Come sing along!

programme.title: E8 - Mommy’s Helping Heart
programme.desc: Its Little Angel! Where baby John, his brother, Jack, and sister, Jill inspire kids and families to have fun and to grow and learn through play. Come sing along!

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E1 - Solving the Biggest Mysteries!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are on the case, solving the biggest mysteries in town! When Aunt Augustine's new necklace is stolen, Detective Mila & Morphle find clues to track down the culprits. Then, Winston & the Bandits steal a time machine & use it to go to the future! Mila & Morphle must follow them to get it back. The mysteries continue as the Bandits steal Morphle & the friends must find him, & a body swap device causes a confusing mix-up!

programme.title: E1 - Battling Evil Robots & Racing Villains!
programme.desc: Get ready for an action-packed day of battling evil robots & racing villains! First, the new & improved Robofreeze becomes faulty, & Mila & Morphle must help Officer Freeze retrieve the remote to turn him off! Then, it's time for the Pet Port Rally, but naughty Winston cheats by using sneaky devices to slow everyone down. The chaos continues as two Robofreezes turn evil & multiply, & a lightning strike turns another one into a super-powered menace!

programme.title: E21 - Mommy’s Magic Touch
programme.desc: It's song and dance time! Join JJ, his friends and family celebrating life's big moments for little kids. Come along and be part of their fun everyday adventures.

programme.title: E10 - Mommy’s Proud Day
programme.desc: Its Little Angel! Where baby John, his brother, Jack, and sister, Jill inspire kids and families to have fun and to grow and learn through play. Come sing along!

programme.title: E1 - A Barnyard Boogie with JJ!
programme.desc: Get ready for a barnyard boogie with JJ & his friends! The dance party kicks off on the farm with a fun rendition of the 'Yes, Yes Vegetable Song,' where all the animals come to dance. Then, it's time to wake up the little bunny friends with a merry tune & hop, march & skip around! Join the fun as the kids sing 'Old Macdonald,' ride a little green tractor to find their animal pals & search for five little ducks all over the farm. It's a day full of singing, dancing & farm fun!

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind' Week 6
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Document 72 Hours
programme.desc: This is an unusual program series that explores human dramas through chance encounters with ordinary people at selected locations.

programme.title: Himu-Bus! - Pickup Bus Variety Show
programme.desc: Himura Yuki, from comedy duo Bananaman, who has obtained a mid-sized motor vehicle license, visits 'people in need of transportation' all over Japan. His beloved vehicle 'Himu Bus' carries passengers and feelings to their destination.

Tim
programme.desc: A somewhat mentally handicapped 20-year-old man works as a laborer, but everyone abuses his naivete. A nice 40-year-old American woman hires him one day and they become close. However, the town and his family see her as predatory.

programme.title: The Coca Cola Kid
programme.desc: A smug sales executive treks to Australia to improve regional sales and becomes embroiled in sexual and professional shenanigans.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: A grumpy widower forms an unlikely friendship with his new neighbors that turns his world around.

programme.title: Nim's Island
programme.desc: Nim is adventure author Alex Rover's number one fan and she lives on an isolated island with her scientist father. When her father is lost at sea and the island is being invaded, she convinces the agoraphobic and a germaphobe author to come and help.

programme.title: Back To The Future III
programme.desc: In Back to the Future Part III, Marty travels to 1885 to save Doc from an outlaw. Packed with laughs, action, and heart, it's the epic Wild West finale to the beloved trilogy.

programme.title: E8 - Part 8
programme.desc: In 1824, Kizzy learns the ultimate fate of her parents. Meanwhile, Mingo teaches Kizzy's son George how to become a cockfighting trainer. This eventually leads to huge unexpected changes in George's status.

programme.title: E8 - Samantha's Old Salem Trip
programme.desc: Samantha and Darrin find out that 17th Century Salem is no place for a witch without witchcraft.

programme.title: E9 - Samantha's Pet Warlock
programme.desc: Ashley Flynn, a warlock, tries to sweep Samantha off her feet but winds up helping Darrin get a new client.

programme.title: E8 - Part 8
programme.desc: In 1824, Kizzy learns the ultimate fate of her parents. Meanwhile, Mingo teaches Kizzy's son George how to become a cockfighting trainer. This eventually leads to huge unexpected changes in George's status.

programme.title: E2 - Part II
programme.desc: A sinister force lurks menacingly behind the warm visage of Pennywise the Clown, who awakens every thirty years, altering reality to animate victims' greatest fears in Stephen King's IT.

programme.title: E4 - Poke High
programme.desc: While Kelly tries to score with a high school fullback, Al roots for the opposing team in hopes his old school record will remain intact.

programme.title: E4 - Wedding Bell Blues
programme.desc: When Lynn encourages ALF to draw up his family tree, he discovers that his parents were married before he was born--a disgrace on his native planet, Melmac.

programme.title: E10 - Part 10
programme.desc: In 1859, George returns home, he finds his son Tom, now a blacksmith. When the Civil War begins, Tom is recruited--and cruelly mistreated--as a smithy for the Army, when he meets a come an important part of their lives.

programme.title: E19 - Bombshell
programme.desc: After Jerry Bullard is found stabbed in a parking garage, Benson and Stabler discover that the family man might have had an illicit hobby.

programme.title: E22 - All In The Family
programme.desc: Al is less than thrilled when Peggy announces her family is coming for a visit - all six of them.

programme.title: E4 - Poke High

programme.title: Dreamscapes, Architectural Wonders (II)
programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. E15 - 夢幻城堡「好戲」即將上演
programme.desc: 一檔演員搭檔研習進階真人秀，由關錦鵬、吳鎮宇、許鞍華擔當“研習制作人”，參與研習階段任務、監制和拍攝作品，蘇可擔任“研習指導”，陳喬恩、謝娜、李維嘉、吳昕作為“研習助力團”；十多位參與的青年演員，通過共同的生活和訓練，共同開啟尋找搭檔的研習生活。

programme.title: E34 - 電競男神來相親
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: Succession Within A Family Business
programme.desc: Corentin is 28 years old and a farmer in Belgium. He wants to take over the family farm, which is 100 years old-and to do so, he has to take on a massive amount of debt. In this film, we follow Corentin and his father to the notary-and wonder: Will he really go through with it?

programme.title: Succession Within A Family Business
programme.desc: Corentin is 28 years old and a farmer in Belgium. He wants to take over the family farm, which is 100 years old-and to do so, he has to take on a massive amount of debt. In this film, we follow Corentin and his father to the notary-and wonder: Will he really go through with it?

programme.title: I Am Fine But
programme.desc: A year spent as a volunteer in Berlin. For Angeli from Cameroon, this is the first big trip of his life. How does voluntary service in another country shape a young person?

programme.title: Succession Within A Family Business
programme.desc: Corentin is 28 years old and a farmer in Belgium. He wants to take over the family farm, which is 100 years old-and to do so, he has to take on a massive amount of debt. In this film, we follow Corentin and his father to the notary-and wonder: Will he really go through with it?

programme.title: Succession Within A Family Business
programme.desc: Corentin is 28 years old and a farmer in Belgium. He wants to take over the family farm, which is 100 years old-and to do so, he has to take on a massive amount of debt. In this film, we follow Corentin and his father to the notary-and wonder: Will he really go through with it?

programme.title: A Woman In The Well Of Death: India's Bravest Stunt Driver
programme.desc: Rehana Khan is one of India's few female stunt drivers. She tours the country's fairgrounds, drawing crowds as she rips around the 'Well of Death” on her motorcycle - a massive wooden structure with vertical walls. This danger is only compounded by the difficulty in making ends meet for her family as India's travelling fairs struggle to compete with modern entertainment.

programme.title: Back To The Bunker? - The Eternal Fear Of War
programme.desc: Time spent hiding in bunkers shapes people for the rest of their lives. This film examines a span from World War II to the Cold War to the current threats that are forcing many people into shelters again today.

programme.title: Breaking Chains
programme.desc: Economic insecurity is part of a cycle of disadvantages for women, often caused by discrimination in employment and education. Women often don't control key assets such as the family home, property, or the right to make financial decisions, further limiting their chances to break the poverty cycle. HER meets three women striving to change that.

programme.title: Tunisia - The Betrayed Revolution
programme.desc: The Jasmin Revolution took place in Tunisia in 2010. In 2024, President Kais Saied was re-elected by a large majority. In 2019, he was still seen as a man of integrity and loyal to the constitution. Today, Saied's ruling style is autocratic.

programme.title: A Woman In The Well Of Death: India's Bravest Stunt Driver
programme.desc: Rehana Khan is one of India's few female stunt drivers. She tours the country's fairgrounds, drawing crowds as she rips around the 'Well of Death” on her motorcycle - a massive wooden structure with vertical walls. This danger is only compounded by the difficulty in making ends meet for her family as India's travelling fairs struggle to compete with modern entertainment.

programme.title: Breaking Chains

programme.title: How Africa Is Building Forward
programme.desc: Today, host Maty Sy welcomes you from the new Goethe-Institut in Dakar, designed by Pritzker Prize laureate Francis Kere. Senegalese architect Nzinga Mboup, who oversaw the project, tours you around.

programme.title: Big Crime Threatens Sea Cucumbers In The Indian Ocean
programme.desc: Sea cucumber populations in the Indian Ocean are being plundered by poachers. In Nigeria, an entrepreneur hopes to turn a profit with scorpion venom. Plus: older women score goals in Ecuador.

programme.title: Tunisia - The Betrayed Revolution

programme.title: Trip to South Korea
programme.desc: Zoe's mum doesn't like cakes, so Zoe isn't sure what to make for her birthday. Alim suggests visiting their penfriend Kachiko, who lives in South Korea. They meet up with her on the beach.

programme.title: The Feast of Fools
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, life may be tough, but having fun is also on the agenda! Folly Festival is a carnival where everyone sings and dances, but also has fun trading places. Howler becomes a princess for the day, and Little Lewis a lord.

programme.title: The Underground Wonders
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts explore a cave system and discover there's a whole other world underground, with a river, rock formations, and an array of amazing creatures.

programme.title: Silverware
programme.desc: Re-using the silverware to make something so awesome that it has left us in awe!

programme.title: Secrets and Spies
programme.desc: Doki can't stand when he doesn't know something. So when Gabi becomes extra secretive about her diary, he's determined to find out why. The Team learns about spy techniques and ways to uncover secrets that others don't want you to know!

programme.title: The Mystery of the Hidden Gem
programme.desc: When Addison and Tess find a note in a funny old pair of rummage sale pants, they think they may have found a clue to lead them to a stash of priceless hidden diamonds!

programme.title: The Mystery of the The Number 1 Mean Girls Detective Agency
programme.desc: When the school mean girls, Katie and Dinara, start their own detective agency and solve a rash of neighbourhood mysteries before Addison can, she wonders if she's lost her touch...or if there is something else more nefarious going on.

programme.title: Ghost Story
programme.desc: A ghost is preventing Smorph from getting to sleep but little does he know that all the ghost really wants is to have a light-up party with all his friends.

programme.title: Seashell
programme.desc: Bring the beach closer to you with these DIY activities!

programme.title: The Biggest Kite
programme.desc: Oto takes his cousin to the park, and the kids all build kites. When it gets windy, they realise the biggest kite isn't always the best.

programme.title: Ballgame
programme.desc: In antiquity, ballgame, the ancestor of basketball, was the favourite sport of Mesoamerican civilisations. There was nothing like this game to entertain the crowd and honour the gods. But cheats like Roach better beware... because the wrath of the gods is no joke!

programme.title: Sustainable Food
programme.desc: Kids try sustainable food.

programme.title: Place of Big Noise
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers travel to Augrabies Falls National Park in South Africa to discover the secrets of life in the desert. They spot many wild animals and face their fears on a trip to white water rapids.

programme.title: Micro Mycology
programme.desc: How to make ice cream without a freezer? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of organic chemistry. Have hands-on fun by making your own ice cream, and get to know Gloria Lim, who studied fungi, their use to humans, and their role in decomposition.

programme.title: Recycle the Drawers
programme.desc: Today the Grimwades decide to recycle their drawers. First, they purchase a chest of drawers from a charity second-hand furniture shop. Then, each of the children chooses a different colour, repaints their drawer and puts a positive message on it.

programme.title: Reduce on the Beach
programme.desc: After enjoying a day out at the seaside, the Grimwades want to throw their rubbish in a waste bin. But the bins in popular places like the seaside can fill up quickly and spill over. To reduce rubbish in the bin, they decide to take it home and put it in the compost.

programme.title: Busy Bees
programme.desc: Oto is afraid of bees, and Yoko asks them to leave the park. But shortly after that, Yoko and the children realize how important bees are to our ecosystem and try to get them back.

programme.title: Trip to Ecuador
programme.desc: Zoe's avocado tree is not in good shape, and she doesn't know how to revive it. Our friends travel to Ecuador, where they meet Idzi. He has a fabulous garden and a particular way to tend it.

programme.title: True Bromance
programme.desc: Artistic gymnasts Alice and Erin team up with trampolinists Morgan and Evie on a mission to save the planet. And Seb and Shakiem have a big competition looming, so they are having a motivational sleepover before heading to the British Tumbling Championships.

programme.title: Newcomers
programme.desc: Marisa arrives at the shelter with eleven puppies, two cats, and seven kittens. And that is just from one household. Holly's foster dog's heritage gets revealed, and long-term resident Doris hopes for a home.

programme.title: Escaping the Wasp
programme.desc: In the pools of Madagascar, the frog spawn is safe from most predators that can't fly. The wasp, however, wants tadpoles for dinner. When the tadpoles sense the attack they emerge and drop deep into the water.

programme.title: Fish in Muddy Burrows
programme.desc: Mudskipper fish live on land in muddy burrows. They come out at low tide to look for small plants and animal matter to eat. They can hold water in their gills and by keeping their skin moist they can breathe through it like amphibians do.

programme.title: Rock Around The Clock
programme.desc: While admiring the sea life in an ocean rock pool, Darwin & Newts discover that the water level is lowering. They try to stop the leak to save the creatures, but learn that they didn't need to worry.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Day of the Trash
programme.desc: Ricky is tidying up. His dad brings around a box of his old junk, including a robot, which helps him to create a pointillism picture with cotton buds. His old pogo stick inspires Ricky and his friends to make a huge pogo painting.

programme.title: Busy Bees
programme.desc: Oto is afraid of bees, and Yoko asks them to leave the park. But shortly after that, Yoko and the children realize how important bees are to our ecosystem and try to get them back.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Hidden Gem
programme.desc: When Addison and Tess find a note in a funny old pair of rummage sale pants, they think they may have found a clue to lead them to a stash of priceless hidden diamonds!

programme.title: The Mystery of the The Number 1 Mean Girls Detective Agency
programme.desc: When the school mean girls, Katie and Dinara, start their own detective agency and solve a rash of neighbourhood mysteries before Addison can, she wonders if she's lost her touch...or if there is something else more nefarious going on.

programme.title: Ghost Story
programme.desc: A ghost is preventing Smorph from getting to sleep but little does he know that all the ghost really wants is to have a light-up party with all his friends.

programme.title: Seashell
programme.desc: Bring the beach closer to you with these DIY activities!

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Pizza Box
programme.desc: After a nice hearty meal, let's get DIY-ing with Hepi and Briko.

programme.title: Day of the Not Christmas
programme.desc: When a snowstorm blows into Bristol, Gav surprises Ricky by announcing that Christmas is here! He tries to resist everyone's enthusiasm to celebrate the big day early. But after creating some festive art, even Ricky falls under the Christmas spell.

programme.title: What Makes Bread Rise?
programme.desc: Bread rises thanks to a chemical reaction called fermentation and yeast, which converts sugars in the dough into carbon dioxide and ethanol. The carbon dioxide created is trapped in the elastic gluten network causing the dough to rise and expand.

programme.title: On the Spoor of the Big Snake - Part 3: Making Deep Tracks
programme.desc: Five young explorers visit the biggest canyon in Africa on their search for the legendary Big Snake in [Ai] Ais/Richtersveld Transfrontier Park. They learn about geology and how the canyon was shaped and listen to campfire stories about the Big Snake.

programme.title: Sloth Moths and Their Very Slow Host
programme.desc: For sloths, every day is a bad-hair day. Their matted locks are crawling with life - from parasites, to algae to a colony of sloth moths. Sloths provide a breeding ground for the moths too!

programme.title: Signature Painting
programme.desc: Make your name disappear in a game of colored shapes.

programme.title: Busy Bees
programme.desc: Oto is afraid of bees, and Yoko asks them to leave the park. But shortly after that, Yoko and the children realize how important bees are to our ecosystem and try to get them back.

programme.title: What Makes Bread Rise?
programme.desc: Bread rises thanks to a chemical reaction called fermentation and yeast, which converts sugars in the dough into carbon dioxide and ethanol. The carbon dioxide created is trapped in the elastic gluten network causing the dough to rise and expand.

programme.title: Where is Maths in Time?
programme.desc: Maths has helped us measure time and dates in different ways through the ages, from using the sun to calculate the time to using the lines of longitude to divide the earth into time zones.

programme.title: A Singing Dog
programme.desc: Tilly, the dog, needs an operation to sort her wonky legs. The Junior Vets are checking Blue's teeth, and Johnny and Inel discover a singing dog and help the owner of an angry bird.

programme.title: River Race
programme.desc: Darwin, Newts and Heni compete in a river race using rubber band boats, but when Newts' boat zooms off in the wrong direction, they have to work out why.

programme.title: What Makes Fireworks Bang?
programme.desc: Fireworks were invented in China and were originally thought to be able to get rid of evil spirits and bring good luck. One of the most important components in fireworks is gunpowder. The different metal salts produce the colours.

programme.title: Signature Painting
programme.desc: Make your name disappear in a game of colored shapes.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Pizza Box
programme.desc: After a nice hearty meal, let's get DIY-ing with Hepi and Briko.

programme.title: Trip to Ecuador
programme.desc: Zoe's avocado tree is not in good shape, and she doesn't know how to revive it. Our friends travel to Ecuador, where they meet Idzi. He has a fabulous garden and a particular way to tend it.

programme.title: Ghost Story
programme.desc: A ghost is preventing Smorph from getting to sleep but little does he know that all the ghost really wants is to have a light-up party with all his friends.

programme.title: The Underground Wonders
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts explore a cave system and discover there's a whole other world underground, with a river, rock formations, and an array of amazing creatures.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Trip to Ecuador
programme.desc: Zoe's avocado tree is not in good shape, and she doesn't know how to revive it. Our friends travel to Ecuador, where they meet Idzi. He has a fabulous garden and a particular way to tend it.

programme.title: Micro Mycology
programme.desc: How to make ice cream without a freezer? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of organic chemistry. Have hands-on fun by making your own ice cream, and get to know Gloria Lim, who studied fungi, their use to humans, and their role in decomposition.

programme.title: Sloth Moths and Their Very Slow Host
programme.desc: For sloths, every day is a bad-hair day. Their matted locks are crawling with life - from parasites, to algae to a colony of sloth moths. Sloths provide a breeding ground for the moths too!

programme.title: Secrets and Spies
programme.desc: Doki can't stand when he doesn't know something. So when Gabi becomes extra secretive about her diary, he's determined to find out why. The Team learns about spy techniques and ways to uncover secrets that others don't want you to know!

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: E408 - Mascota Mobile / Kite Festival
programme.desc: Dora is about to give her pets a bath when the pet-washing truck goes haywire, and she has to save pets throughout the rainforest! // Dora and Boots save a mouse in time for him to show off his giant kite at the Rainforest Kite Festival.

programme.title: E208 - Bbarbalalalalalala / The Biodisaster
programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life! / Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.title: E223 - Pups Save A Snowboard Competition / Pups Save A Chicken Of The Sea
programme.desc: Jake and Everest are excited for the Snowboard Competition, until they see the course is buried under a blanket of snow. // When the PAW Patrol sets out to retrieve Cap'n Turbot's sunken diving bell, they meet a giant Sea Slug!

programme.title: E224 - Pups Save A Pizza / Pups Save Skye
programme.desc: Alex and Mr. Porter are delivering pizza dough for a big party when the van spins out of control. Pups to the rescue! // Skye is on her way to Jake's Mountain when she crash lands in the snow. Ryder calls Everest to save the day!

programme.title: E202 - Super Dad
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Managing Asia
programme.desc: CNBC's longest running feature show. For over 20 years Christine Tan has been talking to people who are shaping, governing and leading the Asia-Pacific region in this multi-award award winning show.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: CNBC Sports - PGA Tour
programme.desc: Highlights from the latest PGA TOUR tournament.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. programme.title: E15 - Fricadelle With Samurai Sauce
programme.desc: Leila Albert welcomes Laurence Grimonprez, an antique dealer and chef of Guadeloupean and Northern French origin, to her kitchen. She concocts a recipe for fricadelle, the flagship product of the North, accompanied by a samurai sauce with West Indian chilli and sweet potato pickles.

programme.title: E5 - Super Bowls For The Super Bowl
programme.desc: With commentator Matthieu Proulx, host Isabelle Racicot, actress Marie-Eve Perron, and chef Carolyne Frigon, we prepare super healthy bowls to challenge junk food culture.

programme.title: E12 - Julien Boutillot/Redevelopment/Garden Of The Five Senses
programme.desc: Contents: Julien Boutillot, the market gardener who grows his vegetables to music; the challenges of rewilding forests; the Garden of the Five Senses in Yvoire; Don't panic: back to the retirement home.

programme.title: E7 - Musee Des Beaux-Arts Du Perigord/Tuan Tran/Schiaparelli
programme.desc: The Musee des Beaux-Arts du Perigord offers a rich and varied selection of works. In his studio, Tuan Tran combines the finesse of glass with the brutality of concrete. At Schiaparelli, masculine and feminine are confidently combined. Dive behind the scenes of D'Offard wallpaper production.

programme.title: E6 - Flying Over The Mountains
programme.desc: To learn more about backcountry skiing, Alexis and Thomas travel to Golden, British Columbia, where they experience two extremes: the luxury of heliskiing and the simple life of ''ski bums.''

programme.title: E14 - Imane Ayissi
programme.desc: The designer and ambassador for African fabric Imane Ayissi presents his haute couture collection for the autumn-winter 2023-2024 season.

programme.title: E4 - The Philadelphia Museum Of Art, Impressionism
programme.desc: At the heart of the Philadelphia Museum of Art hang works by leading impressionist painters, such as Manet, Degas, Sisley, Monet, Morisot, Renoir and Pissarro.

programme.title: E15 - Fricadelle With Samurai Sauce

programme.title: E1 - Rock'n Flight
programme.desc: Al Comet, alias Alain Monod, is a former member of the Young Gods, pioneers of electro industrial music. At 65, he traded his electric guitar for an Indian sitar. And when he is not giving concerts, it is in the air that he practices his other passion, aerial acrobatics.

programme.title: E4 - Vise
programme.desc: Located along the Meuse River, Vise offers an ideal setting for walkers. It includes: Argenteau, Cheratte, Lanaye, Lixhe-Loen and Richelle. Among the highlights: the town hall, a jewel of Mosan Renaissance architecture, its marina, and the Collegiate Church of Saint Martin.

programme.title: E6 - Unusual Schools
programme.desc: From prestigious schools to the most unconventional training programmes, Yvan meets those who pass on their knowledge in rather unexpected places.

programme.title: E1 - Mussels And Fries My Way
programme.desc: Together with comedian Brigitte Rosset, Annick Jeanmairet offers you the recipe for a popular dish: mussels and fries. You will learn how to make crispy fries without a deep fryer or an AirFryer. Discovery of the day: artisanal marshmallows.

programme.title: The Third Murder
programme.desc: A convicted murderer is arrested again, following the death of his boss. He pleads guilty but his lawyer is unconvinced.

programme.title: The Hummingbird Project
programme.desc: A pair of ruthless financial traders take on their former employer in a plot to develop a high-speed fibre-optic cable.

programme.title: For Sama
programme.desc: Amidst the chaos of war-torn Syria, a woman falls in love, marries, and has a daughter. Oscar nominee, Best Documentary

programme.title: Bye Bye Morons
programme.desc: A terminally ill hairdresser sets out to find the son she abandoned years ago.

programme.title: Broker
programme.desc: A mother goes on a road trip with two baby brokers to sell the baby she abandoned as the police follow their trail.

programme.title: Ben Is Back
programme.desc: When her errant son returns home unexpectedly one Christmas Eve, a doting mother realises her family is in harm's way.

programme.title: Queen Of Crime
programme.desc: Outraged by an extortionate water bill she has no hope of paying, a frustrated housewife becomes a private detective.

programme.title: MOViE MOViE Home Premieres: Wandering
programme.desc: A woman forms a strange bond with the man who was accused of kidnapping her as a child.

programme.title: Top Doc Monday: For Sama
programme.desc: Amidst the chaos of war-torn Syria, a woman falls in love, marries, and has a daughter. Oscar nominee, Best Documentary

programme.title: Wandering

programme.title: Le journal - L'invité au coeur de l'info[Live]
programme.desc: Une interview au format long avec une personnalité influente du monde politique, culturel, scientifique ou humanitaire, offrant une plongée approfondie au cœur de l'actualité internationale. À travers ses analyses et son expérience, elle apporte un éclairage unique sur les grands enjeux de notre époque.

programme.title: Sports[Live]
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: L'essentiel : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: L'essentiel de l'actualité : un grand journal couvrant politique, économie et sport, enrichi de décryptages clairs et d'analyses approfondies des événements majeurs. Un rendez-vous pour s'informer efficacement et mieux comprendre le monde d'aujourd'hui.

programme.title: L'essentiel : le journal[Live]

programme.title: La question qui fâche[Live]
programme.desc: Rencontre avec un invité autour d'un sujet d'actualité au cœur des débats et des divergences d'opinion. L'émission propose une analyse approfondie, directe et sans détour des thématiques sensibles, afin d'éclairer les enjeux et de nourrir la réflexion.

programme.title: Le journal de l'Afrique[Live]
programme.desc: Direction l'Afrique pour un rendez-vous quotidien afin de suivre l'actualité du continent africain, avec des correspondants et des invités en plateau.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: L'essentiel : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: L'essentiel de l'actualité : un grand journal couvrant politique, économie et sport, enrichi de décryptages clairs et d'analyses approfondies des événements majeurs. Un rendez-vous pour s'informer efficacement et mieux comprendre le monde d'aujourd'hui.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

E32 - The Voice Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels start talking to each other in the wrong voices it's clear something has gone awry. But Duggee has his voice badge. He knows what to do!

programme.title: E21 - Pak Choi
programme.desc: Pak Choi, who might be known by many names, sings about how she's 'Always Pak To You!'

programme.title: E5 - Desserts Of Destiny
programme.desc: Evil Pea lures Supertato and Tomato into her cave of frosted doom. Can they find the courage to avoid her traps and retrieve The Lost Candle of Birthdays for Tomato's Museum?

programme.title: E12 - The Waiting Badge
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: E14 - The Shopping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E10 - Campfire Choir
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: E97 - Treasure Trail
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po follow a trail of flowers which leads them to some very special treasure.

programme.title: E1 - Ready Steady Go!
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing and do some exercise.

programme.title: E25 - Ragdoll
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: E27 - Musical Statues
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: E29 - Puppets
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: E4 - Panicky Percy
programme.desc: Percy causes confusion for everyone and prompts delays, when he spends too much time panicking over nothing.

programme.title: E29 - Go Jet Academy: Map Readers
programme.desc: Glitch races the Go Jetters across the Academy to find the lost G.O. Dome of the Ancients.

programme.title: E30 - The Boreal Forest, Canada
programme.desc: Glitch travels to Ontario to find a new teddy bear, but things start to go very wrong...

programme.title: E31 - Timgad Ruins, Algeria
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit Timgad in Algeria, but someone is playing games with their click-ons.

programme.title: E4 - The Juice Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is going to make the squirrels juice from the garden. Whilst picking the fruit, the squirrels meet a little bug, full of woes about being too small.

programme.title: E5 - The Footprint Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing hide-and-seek, but they can't find Happy. The squirrels follow lots of different footprints that take them to their friend but there is one set they can't work out.

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.desc: A game of 'grannies' is fun, until Bluey and Bingo can't agree on one simple question: Can Grannies dance? Now they need to video call Nana to get the answer.

programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to the tropical island of Sri Lanka in Southern Asia on a global adventure in search of fishing cats.

programme.title: E1 - The Force of Nature
programme.desc: Climate change is our defining crisis, and it is happening even faster than we thought. But we're not powerless to stop it. The impacts of climate change are felt in every corner of the world. Increased temperatures are causing environmental disasters. The sea levels are rising, the Arctic is melting, coral reefs are dying, oceans are acidifying, and forests are burning. It is clear that business as usual is not an option. With climate change reaching irreversible heights, now is the time for bold collective action. The climate emergency is a race we are losing, but it is a race we can win.

programme.title: E1 - Secrets of the Great White Shark
programme.desc: Feature documentary studying the history of the sharks species, alongside their anatomy and how they’ve helped our oceans for hundreds of millions of years. However, in the modern age they face extinction and demonisation. Over 1000 million sharks are killed every year, and it is up to us to save them.

programme.title: E5 - Heavy Haulage in the Jungle
programme.desc: Heavy transport in the rainforest. For the Sao Manoel hydroelectric power plant in the heart of Brazil, massive elements have to be delivered over a long and arduous route. The transformers weigh more than 200 tonnes each - the way to the destination, almost 4000 kilometres. Heat, dust and dirt roads that are completely dry and full of bumps. The journey becomes dangerous, sometimes it's a matter of centimetres. Then comes the river crossing - with more than 200 tonnes of cargo. The current is unhurried, but what the river swallows is lost. The transport takes seven weeks and delays cost money, breakdowns cost a lot of money - mistakes must not be made here.

The impacts of climate change are felt in every corner of the world. Increased temperatures are causing environmental disasters. The sea levels are rising, the Arctic is melting, coral reefs are dying, oceans are acidifying, and forests are burning. It is clear that business as usual is not an option. With climate change reaching irreversible heights, now is the time for bold collective action. The climate emergency is a race we are losing, but it is a race we can win.

programme.title: E1 - Secrets of the Great White Shark
programme.desc: Feature documentary studying the history of the sharks species, alongside their anatomy and how they’ve helped our oceans for hundreds of millions of years. However, in the modern age they face extinction and demonisation. Over 1000 million sharks are killed every year, and it is up to us to save them.

programme.title: E5 - Heavy Haulage in the Jungle
programme.desc: Heavy transport in the rainforest. For the Sao Manoel hydroelectric power plant in the heart of Brazil, massive elements have to be delivered over a long and arduous route. The transformers weigh more than 200 tonnes each - the way to the destination, almost 4000 kilometres. Heat, dust and dirt roads that are completely dry and full of bumps. The journey becomes dangerous, sometimes it's a matter of centimetres. Then comes the river crossing - with more than 200 tonnes of cargo. The current is unhurried, but what the river swallows is lost. The transport takes seven weeks and delays cost money, breakdowns cost a lot of money - mistakes must not be made here.

programme.title: E1 - Land Meets Bayou
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: E4 - Paranormal Extermination
programme.desc: Billy responds to a construction site where a vicious varmint has the tradespeople running scared. Then Billy and Bea investigate a haunted house to find the source of some strange noises.

programme.title: E13 - Between a Truck and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Robin makes a difficult decision about his beloved mine truck 6-Pack after another expensive breakdown, while Claudia makes a desperate call for help to get their jade out of camp before winter shuts them down.

programme.title: E1 - Mom Gone Wild
programme.desc: Survival expert Bear Grylls takes real people who inspire him into the wild. On the series premiere, Jennifer, a glamper mom of four - two of which have down syndrome - learns camping skills to impress her outdoor-loving family while Bear learns about her international quest that helped save lives.

programme.title: E2 - Mission Possible
programme.desc: Who says you can't do adventure without legs? Former recon marine and war hero Jonathon lost both of his legs in Afghanistan, but his wild spirit lifts him to new heights. He takes on the wilderness with survival expert Bear Grylls and challenges everything you think you know about disability.

programme.title: E5 - The Power Of The Book
programme.desc: Fara and Koto are two children born with disabilities. Seeing this as a curse, their parents plan to bury them alive to ward it off. Thanks to the kindness of their brothers and sisters, they narrowly escape and embark on a fantastic adventure.

programme.title: E51 - Veterinary Clinic
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: E21 - Rebel Mother
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: E31 - Crested Porcupine
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada:2026
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: E8 - Gregoire Larenaudie (Paris)/Silax (Fontenay-Sous-Bois)
programme.desc: Richard Orlinski meets those reinventing French culinary arts. In Paris' 11th arrondissement, Gregoire Larenaudie runs the restaurant-bakery Panopano. There, he creates innovative dishes where bread, made on site with ancient flours and natural sourdough, takes center stage. In Fontenay-sous-Bois, Franco-Malian pastry chef Silamaka Soukouna, known as Silax, revisits classics by lightening them and combining them with Malian products. Keen to pass on his know-how, he leads culinary workshops in his childhood neighborhood, convinced that pastry-making can be a vector of social emancipation.

programme.title: E7 - Musee Des Beaux-Arts Du Perigord/Tuan Tran/Schiaparelli
programme.desc: The Musee des Beaux-Arts du Perigord offers a rich and varied selection of works. In his studio, Tuan Tran combines the finesse of glass with the brutality of concrete. At Schiaparelli, masculine and feminine are confidently combined. Dive behind the scenes of D'Offard wallpaper production.

programme.title: E22 - Taming Legumes
programme.desc: On the menu: crumbled bacon and lentils, lemony lentil soup, fresh pasta with Italian sausages and haricot beans, homemade falafels, chickpea and chocolate biscuits.

programme.title: Shaurya Aur Anokhi Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.title: E2 - Escape to the Deep
programme.desc: Count down the seconds as the sun sets and predators prowl around the pool before the tide finally rolls in. Persevere as night falls with a kleptomaniacal slug and an acrobatic scallop, while a pair of sneaky crabs take a dangerous shot at romance.

programme.title: E2 - The Cool South
programme.desc: Say goodbye to the tropics and dip into cool southern-coast waters. Come face to face with majestic grey nurse sharks, shape-shifting cuttlefish, and huge blue whales; play with penguins and sea lions; and learn why these seas are brimming with life.

programme.title: E2 - Dilla’s Surprise
programme.desc: Crash a fruit-flinging party celebrating the return of Jelapat, Talaken, Bawan, and Rona to the nursery to join the rest of their classmates. Meanwhile, flooding overtakes the pre-release islands, and injuries stifle the progress of two students.

programme.title: E2 - Home Away from Home
programme.desc: Swim upriver with the Bay Family, where Anna offers a hand raising her grandpups before heading home to find interlopers on her turf. Watch a flood in the mangroves nearly sweep away a baby, and see the Townies eat clean through their resources.

programme.title: E1 - The Journey Begins
programme.desc: The source of the Mekong River is high up in the Tibetan plateau, from there it flows into Yunnan Province, China, where our journey begins. Even though Yunnan occupies less than 4% of China’s land, it is home to over half of its birds and mammals.

programme.title: E2 - Laos: the Mountain Wilds
programme.desc: Steep mountains and tropical monsoons define the Mekong River valley on its route through Laos. Catch glimpses of the wildlife who find refuge in its vibrant ecosystems, from stump-tailed macaques to pied kingfishers to black-crested gibbons.

programme.title: E3 - Thailand: Coming of Age
programme.desc: The temperate north meets the tropical south along the Mekong’s banks in Thailand. Follow the river through the Golden Triangle and see the courtship dances of the region’s abundant bird species. Then take in a festival honouring water spirits.

programme.title: E2 - Home Away from Home
programme.desc: Swim upriver with the Bay Family, where Anna offers a hand raising her grandpups before heading home to find interlopers on her turf. Watch a flood in the mangroves nearly sweep away a baby, and see the Townies eat clean through their resources.

programme.title: E1 - The Journey Begins
programme.desc: The source of the Mekong River is high up in the Tibetan plateau, from there it flows into Yunnan Province, China, where our journey begins. Even though Yunnan occupies less than 4% of China’s land, it is home to over half of its birds and mammals.

programme.title: E2 - Laos: the Mountain Wilds
programme.desc: Steep mountains and tropical monsoons define the Mekong River valley on its route through Laos. Catch glimpses of the wildlife who find refuge in its vibrant ecosystems, from stump-tailed macaques to pied kingfishers to black-crested gibbons.

programme.title: E3 - Thailand: Coming of Age
programme.desc: The temperate north meets the tropical south along the Mekong’s banks in Thailand. Follow the river through the Golden Triangle and see the courtship dances of the region’s abundant bird species. Then take in a festival honouring water spirits.

programme.title: E1 - Back with the Packs
programme.desc: Return to South Luangwa to see the new pups born to the mighty Manzi and the tiny-but-fearless Kakumbi packs. See yearling Snowy face a hungry hyena before a lion pride scatters Manzi mum Weka’s pups and leaves her frantically searching for them.

programme.title: E6 - Indonesia - Life in the Muck
programme.desc: Buried beneath a seabed littered with trash, a community of strange and fascinating creatures thrives against all odds. In this mucky ecosystem, predators and prey run an evolutionary arms race developing unlikely techniques of attack and defense.

programme.title: E7 - Maldives - Paradise Shrinking
programme.desc: The Maldives face an uncertain future as rising sea levels threaten to wipe out the tiny island. See how researchers are rebuilding the reef around the island, working to save sea turtles, and uncovering complex behaviours of resident manta rays.

programme.title: E2 - Tidal Territory
programme.desc: Battle for dominion over the river with crocs, then catch glimpses of an ultra-rare mangrove snake and an endangered nabarlek wallaby. Take to the ocean to see humpback whale mothers raise their calves, then be hunted by false killer whales.

programme.title: E4 - Platypus Predicament
programme.desc: Stand by as rescue officers use a technique called flagging to nab a koala with dangerously inflamed eyes. Soothe burned possum feet with vet Tim, then shadow vet Karina as she examines a half-drowned platypus before referring him to a specialist.

programme.title: E2 - Tidal Territory

programme.title: E4 - The Protectors
programme.desc: A blind woman has found a new lease on life thanks to her canine running mate, a Jack Russell works as a super-nanny to a surprising array of species, and a team of dogs in Kenya are on daily patrol protecting endangered rhinos from poachers.

programme.title: E2 - Escape to the Deep
programme.desc: Count down the seconds as the sun sets and predators prowl around the pool before the tide finally rolls in. Persevere as night falls with a kleptomaniacal slug and an acrobatic scallop, while a pair of sneaky crabs take a dangerous shot at romance.

programme.title: E2 - The Cool South
programme.desc: Say goodbye to the tropics and dip into cool southern-coast waters. Come face to face with majestic grey nurse sharks, shape-shifting cuttlefish, and huge blue whales; play with penguins and sea lions; and learn why these seas are brimming with life.

programme.title: E2 - Dilla’s Surprise
programme.desc: Crash a fruit-flinging party celebrating the return of Jelapat, Talaken, Bawan, and Rona to the nursery to join the rest of their classmates. Meanwhile, flooding overtakes the pre-release islands, and injuries stifle the progress of two students.

programme.title: Y Speak 2.0[Live]
programme.desc: It is a revival and modernization of the iconic Philippine youth talk, and debate show Y Speak that originally aired on Studio 23 from 2004 to 2010. It guides the youth to listen to the past, discern the present, and act for tomorrow.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: Son On The Run
programme.desc: Hung is a stuntman living with his troublesome father, Kwun. Five years ago, he deeply fell in love with May. Yet May's father strongly objected their relations and separated them trickily, with the help of Kwun. One day, May come backs - but with her six-year-old son, Sam. He begins to get back what he loses five years ago. May actually been badly ill before she comes back Hong Kong. Her only wish before die is to bring Sam back to Hung. After May has died, May's father insists to keep Sam by his sides. Hung tries his best to get back Sam. In order to earn more money, he does a very dangerous stunt. At last, he is injured...

programme.title: In The Line Of Duty 4
programme.desc: A detective of the Anti-Narcotics Bureau is pursued for a film he snapped containing evidence of drug-trafficking between a CIA and Hong Kong drug traffickers. Before death, he hands the film over to a Hong Kong immigrant, a pier coolie Luk, who throws it away when the killer arrives. Hong Kong police Madam Yeung assigned to help the local police to investigate the case witnesses Luk killing a killer of the Intelligence Agency but concludes that he is innocent and did it out of defense only. Local detective Donnie and his sidekick Michael Wong are responsible for probing the murder, and when Luk escapes to Hong Kong, Donnie and Yeung immediately to Hong Kong to trace him. Donnie and Michael are also under orders to have him arrested and extradited to the USA. However, Luk and Michael have already been and abducted by the crafty killer...

programme.title: Fight Back To School
programme.desc: A member of the Flying Tiger Squad, Sing, is sent to school as an undercover cop to find the Commissioner's lost gun. To Sing, school is nowhere better than jail. He is suffering until he comes across the school teacher Miss Ho. Sing's school life is thus painted with more colours. Finally, Sing settles every problem and succeeds in finding the lost gun. At the Same Time, he destorys a munition smuggling activity. This leads the smugglers to school to take revenge. A group of students is being kept hostage. Sing shows his true colour by saving all the students. This not only wins his students' admiration but also Miss Ho's heart!

programme.title: Holiday
programme.desc: While holidaying in Goa with her family, a shy Muskaan falls for Dino, a dancer at the resort. Problems ensue when her father objects to their relationship as he believes Dino has impregnated a woman. Release Year: 2006 Director: Pooja Bhatt

programme.desc: Seven years after the roundup in Vietnam, Ma Seok-do joins a new squad to investigate a murder case. Soon, he finds out this case involves busting a synthetic drug and starts to dig deeper...Meanwhile, the guy behind it all-Joo Sung-chul -doesn't stop looking for trouble, and the Japanese drug distributors, Ricky and his gang, come to Korea to join the chaos. Things are just about to get out of hand...
